reviews.review_description: Although it could use one more game mode. Full creative mode. All the different ingredients, garnishes, tools (Like The muddler, and bar spoon, and shaker.), all the glasses, fruit juices, and it actually show the amount of milliliters your pouring, Maybe a new game mode where customers can ask for any drink you can make in the game. Or maybe even new ingredients. If they added a full creative mode, this would be a five star rating.

This game blew my mind and I can make a lot of drinks. But this would be the best vr game ever if you could make your own bar and customize it. You make money throughout the day and buy ingredients and seating and more.

Also add food to cook because this game would be the greatest of all time if you could cook, mix, and customize.
I  love this game honestly, the sandbox mode, which is the mode I mostly play is my favorite
This is good game with nun other like it thanks 😊
It's fun learning new drinks to make, doing juggling tricks and pouring drinks is pretty cool,  picking the ice up and dropping in the glass is a lil glitchy for me but great game

Some bugs like hand closing and not reopening (work around I found was to swap hands by using the grip on the opposite hand) but it’s enough to annoy and break immersion. So it’s a bit of a poor show in my view. 

I had this through horizon + so I had a go and removed it.  If I had paid for it I would not be too happy.

Update: Mixed reality - practice session.

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thanks for sharing your feedback. 
Could you let us know when this happens? Does it occur during regular gameplay, or specifically in mix reality mode? Your input really helps us understand the issue better. If you’d like, you can also join our Discord to discuss it in more detail! 

~VR Factory

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback — even if it’s harsh, it helps us improve the game.

If your issue is with the ice physics and how hard it is to pick up, you can change the settings to place ice in portions without physics. Many players find this much easier.

We’d really appreciate it if you joined our Discord — we’d love to help solve your problem and see exactly what’s not working. This is the fastest way for us to assist.

~VR Factory Games

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback 🙌

We get that it might not feel worth it for everyone — VR Bartender Simulator is designed around learning, and yes, sometimes getting drinks wrong 😄

If you’re looking for pure casual play without the challenge,  You can actually play in Freemode 😄

It’s perfect if you just want to experiment, practice, or have fun without worrying about getting drinks “wrong.” 🍹
We hope that makes the game more enjoyable for casual play too!

~VRF Team

reviews.review_title: Hilarious fun game! Please add more
reviews.review_description:
Hi guys just want to say i love this game! Its so good. Great effort coming up with this concept :) A few suggestions which would make it next level amazing. 

1. if you can make real photo realistic video of customers coming to the bar instead of the graphics. 

2. Ability to run Spotify /apple music to play my own music.

3. Add real celebrities as customers.

4. career mode where you start at like a backyard party, wedding receptions,  all the way to studio 54 or like some superclub in Vegas, Mykonos, Ibiza.

5. As you serve successful drinks the party in the background gets more intense. If you serve bad drinks fights break out with unhappy customers

6. A funny cutscene at the end of the mission when you complete successfully where your customers thank you and hi five you and all end up picking up a partner. 

7. In australia we use 30ml for standard instead of the american 40ml so ablility to switch would be good.

8. You can probably get some alcohol companies to sponser you with their brands.

9. Partnership with Dj game
Where your friends can Dj and you serve drinks multiplayer 

Thats all from me hope this sparks some ideas but love his game and ill recommend it to all my friends
Cheers

reviews.review_description: Ounces, OZ, OUNCES option for

developer_response.body:
Good news — the ounces (OZ) option is already available! 🎉
You can see it as text hints on the screen and as a counter when pouring into a glass. To enable it, go to:
Settings → Language → third row (here you can switch between ml and oz).
This way, you’ll be able to use ounces easily while playing.

~VR Factory Games

reviews.review_description: New to VR, got a Quest for Christmas. This is my favorite game so far in the VR world, but now that I’ve competed all 4 bars, which I did in a month or so of random playing, feel like nothing else to do. Id love to go back to the game and play regularly but dont want to do the same thing already done to check off each bar. I would love to see a career mode beyond the current one, where earning x dollars increases each time once you complete one, having to earn more each time against the clock and making levels. Or having a career mode where you start at a dive bar and work your way up to a fancy bar by doing so many hours or completing so many tasks day by day.
I love this game like so much!!!!
Very fun once you get the hang because you have to remember the drink recipe or look at the hint which brings your money down

Love this game! But now that I've almost completed it, I would love to have a level where customers can order one of any of the drinks you learned in all 4 levels in one round! That would be awesome and make it even more challenging! Can we please make this happen!?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your opinion!
We recommend trying Challenge Mode, where exciting challenges and the chance to beat your own records await you!

~VRF

This app really has a could be  potential power house with some add-ons or updates. But despite needing a few tweeks all in all I love it
get boarded after a little bit anytime you do steps fast they say you did it wrong don’t waste your money.

The game is focused on learning. In Practice Mode, you learn recipes, while in Career Mode, you recreate them. If you want to make drinks without any restrictions and just have fun, we recommend trying Freemode.

~ VR Factory Team

reviews.review_description: I had this game for like 3 weeks maybe and it’s so good, firstly, I can basically do whatever I want, like breaking drinks. Also I found this feature and I laughed so hard. When you put the rude finger with your hands (No controllers) at them, it’s considered as a failure 😂😂😂 I love how they added that. Secondly, it’s good for your brain because you need to memorise the drink so you can give it to the clients. I’m 13 and I completed  2 maps, that’s 16 drinks to memorise! reviews.review_description:
So this is a rlly good app and I have a lil recipe: 
Rooftop bar (I think that what it called) 
20ml of vodka
30ml of tequila 
15ml of sweet vermouth 
10ml of lime juice
Strain into a whiskey glass and add ice
Add a lime
That's it
But anyways, BEST GAME IVE EVER PLAYED, it's so realistic and fun, and you can make almost about any drink ever, the ice physics 😩😩😩😩😩 THEY ARE SO GOOD

This game is amazing on the Meta Quest 2! You feel like a real bartender, mixing drinks and serving customers. The graphics are great, and the controls are super easy to use. It’s fun, relaxing, and perfect for anyone who wants to try something new in VR. Highly recommend!

While you could make and learn a lot of drinks the ability to grab specific items feel very inconvenient and clunky. The glasses and cups should be spaced out or layed out differently to prevent that from happening. I just hope there are more updates to come to improve the NPC interactions and the NPC dialogue, it almost feels as if Siri is talking and ordering a drink.

developer_response.body:
Hey! Thanks for sharing your feedback and detailed thoughts. 🙂
The layout of the glasses and cups was designed to work well with mix reality mode and for players who prefer not to move around the scene. As for the NPCs, we aim for the conversations and orders to feel as natural as possible, so your input is really valuable.

If you’d like, we invite you to join our Discord to discuss your observations and ideas in more detail. 🙌
~VR Factory Team

Thank you so much for the amazing feedback! We’re thrilled you’re having such a great time with the game. Adding jiggers is a fantastic suggestion - it would definitely add to the realism. We’ll keep it in mind for future updates. Cheers! 

– Team VR Factory Games

developer_response.body: We are glad that you think our game is fun, but at the same time we are sorry you decided it only deserves 1 star. One way or another, we are aware that many players will find additional units of measurement useful, and we are now working on implementing them into the game. We hope that you will give Bartender VR Simulator another chance in the future - this time with oz measurement - and reconsider your rating 😉 Thank you!

1/10 DO NOT BUY AND DONT BE SURPRISED WHEN IT SUCKS

developer_response.body: Hi. Despite the fact that your voice is one of the few critical voices, it is very important for us. I'd love to get in touch with you to discuss what caused you to react this way to our game? There are two modes in the game in each bar - the recipes can be seen step by step in the practice mode. In the challenge mode, there is no recipe visible because that's what the challenge is about, to use the knowledge that you gain in the practice mode. In challenge mode when you don't know what to do next you can use the hints. I would be honored if you contact me and we can arrange to talk about your experience with the game. I believe that after our conversation you will change your perspective. Once again, thank you on behalf of the entire VR Factory Games team for sharing your opinion. slawek.matul@vrfactory.pro Best Slawek CEO VR Factory Games

reviews.review_description:
I was really looking forward to playing this game, but unfortunately I am unable to. You start with a trial to show you the ropes on the first few drinks to make, and i was getting into it until it came time to add the soft drink components of the cocktail. They are stored in a two level fridge, which required me to bend down with my hand inches from the floor for the top shelf, and required me to go below the floor for the second shelf whilst seated. 

I recentred multiple times, but unfortunately this game is not designed with accessibility in mind, and as such is unable to be played sitting down. The settings have no accessible features, so I cannot play this game. It's a fun concept and I'm sure I would enjoy it if the game devs make adjustments. Perhaps put the mixers on the bar behind, instead of below, or enable the user to 'crouch' in game. Please consider disabled gamers when making a game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for pointing out this aspect. We will 100% take into account what you wrote and work on a special update to the game to solve this problem. Best Slawek CEO VR Factory Games

reviews.review_description: It’s a good concept and I like the memorizing and everything. Making real drinks is good too. But it’s too buggy; bottles keep falling through my hands and they don’t let me catch the bottles. When the bottles break, it keeps deducting like $6 per break and my character keeps shifting to the right so I can never just stay still. Those bugs keep affecting the game too be played well. It’s not that enjoyable.

If there was an option to give 0 stars I would, because I did campaign and did bad, nothing, then I did good, STILL NOTHING, I did not unlock freeplay, nor the next thing, so now I’m stuck making americanos and other low quality drinks 
other than anything else. And now I wasted 20 dollars, AND FORGOT TO REFUND

developer_response.body: Hello, I see that something is not working as you would like it to work. I can assure you that the game is working correctly. For example, in order to unlock the next bar with new drunks you need to earn a minimum of $120 in that bar.  Be careful not to break bottles or glasses - deducts $2 for breakages 🙂 We would love to contact you to support you Contact us on discord VR Factory Games or email slawek.matul@vrfactory.pro Best Slawek CEO VR Factory Games

reviews.review_description: I have reached the Beach Bar and I am making the drinks TO THE LETTER, yet the customer’s are telling me I am messing up. I even went back to the tutorial for the beach and WROTE DOWN THE INSTRUCTIONS just to make sure I wasn’t forgetting something. But nope, same problem! How am I supposed to progress any further when I am constantly getting penalized for making drinks CORRECTLY?!

developer_response.body: Hi. I specifically checked today in person and everything works 100%. You prepare the drink when it is ordered. You start by putting a napkin on the bar and then you follow the recipe step by step (quantities and order are required) and finally you serve the drink on the napkin. If you do this. Use a good glass. Use good ice - sometimes cubed, sometimes crushed - it should be fine. If you have problems contact us on Discord or me by email slawek.matul@vrfactory.pro Hopefully we can find the problem and solve it and you can have a great time!!! Best Slawek CEO VR Factory Games

reviews.review_title: To hard and to boring and repetitive
reviews.review_description: First level was already annoying because it gives a tutorial on the 4 drinks and it expects you to remember them instantly but instead I had to learn the drinks by trial and error over and OVER again which itself was bad then the fridge doesn't want to open half the time and for some reason if you don't put the napkin down first the entire drink is wrong? Eventually I got past level one THEN in level 2 immediately everything you just did is now triple what you have to do just to make one drink and more ingredients and it's just a bad experience overall for me at least. If you are not a bartender in real life don't expect to get far. Etc

developer_response.body: thank you for sharing your impressions of the game.  We are sorry that you do not like what is the strength of this game. Together with six-time world champion bartender Tomasz Malek, we worked for two years to bring the world of bartending to VR. We have created a unique bartending game/course that, for a fraction of the price of real bartending courses, allows you to play your way into this world. The fact that you have to lay down a napkin to start serving a customer or the fact that you can't put ice in it with a glass to prevent pieces of glass falling into the ice is part of the bartending know-how. The game allows you to learn newer and more complex drinks and techniques for creating them with every bar. It is true that there is a lot of learning, but we also tried to make it challenging and entertaining. I hope that after reading this message you will change your very harsh assessment. And if you want a tongue-in-cheek approach to bartending, play our Horror Bar game :) Best Slawek CEO VR Factory Games

developer_response.body: We love this kind of feedback!!! Enjoy Team VR Factory Games

reviews.review_title: Accurate but buggie,  and not accessible
reviews.review_description:
I like how accurate it is and I don't mind the bugs as the devs seem active. The accessibility issue though makes it so I can't play it. 

The re-centering is a bit wonky with the height. Most games allow you to ajust the height of things but you cant in this game. I play seated due to accessibility issues and I can't grab the sodas without nearly falling out of the chair. 

Weird bugs when putting ice in the cup sometimes it randomly says you're wrong even when you're not. 

It makes you do the drinks in a specific order or it fails you which doesn't fit the realistic nature of the game. When youre bartending quickly, you need to multi-task. Only some drinks let's you go out of order. 

Rimming the shot glass with salt for a tequila shot failed about half the time. Would say wrong prep step. 

The visuals for a number of drinks are a bit wonky. Where the liquid level will be inaccurate. Sometimes the instructions are a bit misleading where it says "fill up the glass with crushed ice" one scoop only gets you 1/4 way full so you think you need more ice and put more, but you're wrong. 

There's a number of other text issues in instructions. Like it says strain into glass but there is no strainer and pouring straight from the blender into the glass is what you're supposed to do. 

Anyway, I'd revisit this in a while or when they fix the height issue.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your opinion and comments. We will take a closer look at them. Best Team VR Factory Games

reviews.review_description: I’ve been addicted to this game since I bought it!!! So much fun to play. Only issue is on bar 2 doesn’t let me continue career mode even though all drinks were practiced and passed while in career mode.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kindness. We are glad that you like the game so much and share it with the world. The problem you write about should no longer occur. Best VR Factory Games Team

reviews.review_description: I love this game, I love how challenging it is. I have a few ideas and suggestions. Maybe add a dlc thats inspired by starbucks? Like you're in a cafe, and making coffee drinks and like the pink drink. And also I'd say to improve the graphics and make it similiar to the pcvr version, cause the graphics on this game is a little bad and the pouring liquid animation sucks a bit. But yeah this game is very nice and I love it very very much!

developer_response.body: We are glad that you like the game!!! Thank you for your substantive comments on the game. Here's to great ideas. We are working on the game all the time. Look out for more updates. Best Team VR Factory Games

reviews.review_description: i wish they added how to make them cause i dont remeber mabye add like a paper that shows u how to make the drinks and stuff like what to do and it was 20$ i dont think it was fully worth it so add this pls

developer_response.body: Thank you for your vote. For your ideas. We are working on many expansions and development of the game. Be on the lookout. Best Slawek CEO VR Factory Games
